description: Create a chapter divider slide for Chapter 10 on first-line risk management skills, with chapter header text and no analytical content layout.

header.kicker: SECOND ANNUAL EY/IIF GLOBAL INSURANCE RISK MANAGEMENT SURVEY
header.headline: Chapter 10
header.sub: In terms of the most important skill sets for the next five years, CROs see several different types of talent as comparably valuable. Diverse and holistic skills are necessary for effective risk management on both the first and second lines.
